entries.sentence: Use only a small quantity of salt in the soup.
entries.chinese: quantity = 数量；这道汤里只放少量盐。

entries.sentence: Please complete the questionnaire after the course.
entries.chinese: questionnaire = 问卷；课程结束后请完成这份问卷。

entries.sentence: Her dream of becoming a pilot became a reality.
entries.chinese: reality = 现实；她成为飞行员的梦想变成了现实。

entries.sentence: Ask for the key at reception when you arrive.
entries.chinese: reception = 接待处；到达时请去接待处领取钥匙。

entries.sentence: The receptionist booked a taxi for us.
entries.chinese: receptionist = 接待员；接待员为我们预订了一辆出租车。

entries.sentence: Light refreshments will be served after the meeting.
entries.chinese: refreshments = 茶点；会议结束后将提供简单茶点。

entries.sentence: Online registration closes on Friday.
entries.chinese: registration = 注册；网上注册将于星期五截止。

entries.sentence: The report explains the relation between exercise and sleep.
entries.chinese: relation = 关系；这份报告解释了运动与睡眠之间的关系。

entries.sentence: I listen to quiet music for relaxation.
entries.chinese: relaxation = 放松；我听轻柔的音乐来放松。

entries.sentence: The test result will arrive by email.
entries.chinese: result = 结果；考试结果将通过电子邮件发送。

entries.sentence: My grandfather plans to travel after retirement.
entries.chinese: retirement = 退休；我祖父计划退休后去旅行。

entries.sentence: The film is a romance set in Paris.
entries.chinese: romance = 爱情故事；这部电影是一个以巴黎为背景的爱情故事。

entries.sentence: My brother enjoys science fiction about life on other planets.
entries.chinese: science fiction = 科幻小说；我弟弟喜欢关于其他星球生命的科幻小说。

entries.sentence: Can you keep this plan a secret?
entries.chinese: secret = 秘密；你能对这个计划保密吗？

entries.sentence: Read the final section of the article.
entries.chinese: section = 部分；阅读这篇文章的最后一部分。

entries.sentence: The hotel has good security at night.
entries.chinese: security = 安保措施；这家酒店夜间的安保措施很好。

entries.sentence: The security guard showed us the emergency exit.
entries.chinese: security guard = 保安；保安向我们指出了紧急出口。

entries.sentence: There was complete silence during the exam.
entries.chinese: silence = 安静；考试期间一片安静。

entries.sentence: We stayed calm in a difficult situation.
entries.chinese: situation = 情况；我们在困难的情况下保持冷静。

entries.sentence: We found a simple solution to the problem.
entries.chinese: solution = 解决办法；我们找到了这个问题的简单解决办法。

entries.sentence: The spaceship landed safely on the moon.
entries.chinese: spaceship = 宇宙飞船；宇宙飞船安全降落在月球上。

entries.sentence: Ella made a useful suggestion for the school trip.
entries.chinese: suggestion = 建议；埃拉为学校旅行提出了一条有用的建议。

entries.sentence: Our school is hosting a chess tournament.
entries.chinese: tournament = 锦标赛；我们学校正在举办国际象棋锦标赛。

entries.sentence: I read an English translation of the novel.
entries.chinese: translation = 译本；我读了这部小说的英文译本。

entries.sentence: The new jobs helped reduce unemployment in the town.
entries.chinese: unemployment = 失业；这些新工作帮助减少了镇上的失业现象。

entries.sentence: I saw a dog and an elephant at the zoo.
entries.chinese: a / an = 一个；我在动物园看到一只狗和一头大象。

entries.sentence: We talked about our plans for the weekend.
entries.chinese: about = 关于；我们谈了周末的计划。

entries.sentence: The clock hangs above the classroom door.
entries.chinese: above = 在上方；时钟挂在教室门的上方。

entries.sentence: You are absolutely right about the answer.
entries.chinese: absolutely = 完全地；你的答案完全正确。

entries.sentence: According to the timetable, the train leaves at nine.
entries.chinese: according to = 根据；根据时间表，火车九点出发。

entries.sentence: We walked across the bridge to the station.
entries.chinese: across = 穿过；我们穿过桥走到车站。

entries.sentence: I thought the cafe was closed, but it is actually open.
entries.chinese: actually = 实际上；我以为咖啡馆关门了，但它实际上还开着。

entries.sentence: We went for a walk after dinner.
entries.chinese: after = 在...之后；晚饭后我们去散步了。

entries.sentence: Could you say that again, please?
entries.chinese: again = 再一次；请问你能再说一次吗？

entries.sentence: Do not lean your bicycle against the window.
entries.chinese: against = 倚靠；不要把自行车靠在窗户上。

entries.sentence: We moved here three years ago.
entries.chinese: ago = 以前；我们三年前搬到这里。

entries.sentence: Go straight ahead and turn left at the bank.
entries.chinese: ahead = 向前；一直向前走，在银行处左转。

entries.sentence: The twins look alike, but they have different interests.
entries.chinese: alike = 相像；这对双胞胎看起来很像，但兴趣不同。

entries.sentence: All the students finished the test on time.
entries.chinese: all = 所有的；所有学生都按时完成了考试。

entries.sentence: It is almost time to leave.
entries.chinese: almost = 几乎；差不多该离开了。

entries.sentence: I do not like walking home alone at night.
entries.chinese: alone = 独自；我不喜欢夜里独自走回家。

entries.sentence: We cycled along the river.
entries.chinese: along = 沿着；我们沿着河骑自行车。

entries.sentence: Please read the first paragraph aloud.
entries.chinese: aloud = 出声地；请出声朗读第一段。

entries.sentence: I have already finished my homework.
entries.chinese: already = 已经；我已经完成家庭作业了。

entries.sentence: The hotel has a pool and also offers free breakfast.
entries.chinese: also = 也；这家酒店有游泳池，也提供免费早餐。

entries.sentence: Although it was raining, we continued the match.
entries.chinese: although = 虽然；虽然下着雨，我们还是继续了比赛。

entries.sentence: There were twelve students altogether.
entries.chinese: altogether = 总共；总共有十二名学生。

entries.sentence: My bus always arrives at eight.
entries.chinese: always = 总是；我的公交车总是在八点到达。

entries.sentence: The museum opens at nine a.m.
entries.chinese: a.m = 上午；博物馆上午九点开放。

entries.sentence: We found a quiet place among the trees.
entries.chinese: among = 在...之中；我们在树林中找到了一个安静的地方。
